/usr/bin/ar qc libdap_chain_btc_rpc.a CMakeFiles/dap_chain_btc_rpc.dir/dap_chain_btc_rpc.c.o CMakeFiles/dap_chain_btc_rpc.dir/dap_chain_btc_rpc_handlers.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_binary_tree.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_cbuf.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_common.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_config.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_crc64.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_file_utils.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_fnmatch.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_errors.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_list.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_math_convert.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_module.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_strfuncs.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_string.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_time.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_tsd.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_cpu_monitor.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_process_manager.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_process_memory.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdap_chain_btc_rpc.a
